summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with full-stack engineering experience building and deploying scalable web applications and backend services in production. Shipped a real-time AI interview platform with React, Next.js, Express, and PostgreSQL deployed on GCP and Railway, and a production RAG developer tool with a FastAPI backend, React frontend, and automated CI/CD on GitHub Actions. Experienced designing RESTful APIs, building telemetry and evaluation dashboards, and working across cloud infrastructure including Docker and Kubernetes.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, HuggingFace Transformers, Prompt Engineering, NLP, Vector Embeddings
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, AWS, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Node.js, FastAPI, Express.js, RESTful APIs, Microservices, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
